citation.description: test_no_signature_with_sidecar_baseline_is_eligible asserts eligible=True, baseline='sidecar', and the exact sidecar-branch reasons keys. Implementation in attest._sidecar_branch_decision (attest.py:301-347) and sidecar.build_payload (sidecar.py:407-529) stamps verified_at_sha+regver on every verdict.

criteria.criterion: With no certified signature but a prior sidecar carrying material_fingerprint + verified_at_sha + regver (plan changed, code + registry unchanged, within window), eligibility is TRUE. Oracle: unit test over remediation_mode_candidate with a fixture sidecar.

citation.description: test_no_signature_no_sidecar_baseline_not_eligible (sidecar_baseline=False → all three fields None → sidecar_baseline=False → ineligible) covers missing verified_at_sha/regver; test_sidecar_branch_code_drift_not_eligible covers code drift.

criteria.criterion: With code drifted since the prior sidecar, OR a prior sidecar missing verified_at_sha or regver, eligibility is FALSE (fail-safe). Oracle: negative-case unit tests.

citation.description: test_signature_branch_unchanged_and_tagged asserts eligible=True, baseline='signature', and the exact six signature-branch reasons keys {signed, plan_changed, code_unchanged, registry_unchanged, prior_sidecar, within_window}.

criteria.criterion: With a valid certified signature present, the decision is identical to today's signature path (the sidecar fallback is not consulted). Oracle: unit test asserting the signature-path result is unchanged for a signed fixture.

citation.description: test_block_loop_reaches_remediation_eligibility_without_signature performs a real two-round BLOCK loop in a rebar_repo fixture: asserts v1 is BLOCK with a850 stamps, edits the plan, then asserts rem.get('eligible') is True and rem.get('baseline') == 'sidecar' in both v2 coverage and s2 sidecar. No skips or xfails.

criteria.criterion: A BLOCK-loop integration test (review -> BLOCK -> plan edit -> re-review) reaches the floor path (coverage.remediation.eligible true in the round-2 sidecar) without any signature present. Oracle: python -m pytest tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_block_loop_remediation.py -x green.

citation.description: grep for 'the floor does not engage during BLOCK loops' returns no matches (removed). grep for 'sidecar fallback' matches line 336 ('Two eligibility baselines — signature first, sidecar fallback (story a850).'). The replacement paragraph at lines 336-350 documents the fallback behavior in detail.

criteria.criterion: docs/plan-review-gate.md's eligibility description matches the new behavior: the Known-limitation blockquote is removed AND 'sidecar fallback' phrase is present.

citation.description: All test files are non-stubbed (no skip/xfail markers). The implementation in attest.py and sidecar.py is complete with no TODOs or aspirational stubs. Static verification only — actual command invocation is outside file-inspection scope.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test all pass.
